prompt.raw: My vehicle (1998 Dodge Dakota, dark green with a white canopy and no license plate) got into a really bad accident and was towed by a guy named Sam. I tried to call the company later that day and spoke with Sam again- he said that the only way I was able to retrieve my property was by paying him the Tow Fee which was a total of $440.00 and by providing him with the title to the vehicle. The vehicle was totaled and I am only requesting to retrieve my property (my cell phone, tools, and other personal property). I refused to pay him $440.00 for personal property and would like assistance with this matter.

vars.problem_description: I was resolving an issue from unemployment benefits, as due to a bug in their system I couldn't ask for any weeks and calling them resulted in over two hours of waiting for nothing. Late November last year this was resolved but because I didn't put in any weeks, because I couldn't, they gave me nothing for the 12 weeks I was unemployed and due to my case happening just before Thanksgiving weekend that led to a big in-between time me getting the information they wanted and getting back to them resulting in rejection of my claim, with only a hearing left. So I need to get that money to support my family.
